mapper.insert: INSERT INTO visitor_vehicle (user_id, license_plate, visitor_name, visit_purpose, visit_date, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{licensePlate}, #{visitorName}, #{visitPurpose}, #{visitDate}, 'APPROVED', NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT visitor_vehicle_id, user_id, license_plate, visitor_name, visit_date, visit_purpose, status, created_at FROM visitor_vehicle
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{req.startIdx}, #{req.size}
